news-global-econ.title: Van Hollen: Dems Have Midterm 'Momentum' to Beat Trump's 'Personality Cult'
news-global-econ.description:
Sunday on NBC's "Meet the Press," Sen. Chris Van Hollen (D-MD) claimed Democrats had "momentum” in the upcoming midterm election to beat President Donald Trump's "personality cult."

news-global-econ.title: ‘Who’s the Boss?’ star Danny Pintauro exposes the harsh reality behind child stardom
news-global-econ.description: Danny Pintauro, who starred in "Who's the Boss?" as a child, went viral after sharing he drives for Amazon while trying to break back into acting.

news-global-econ.title: Trump, Netanyahu to speak Sunday amid reports of potential revival of military action on Iran
news-global-econ.description: Trump is weighing restarting military action on Iran and will speak with Netanyahu on Sunday amid reports of Iranian deception and delay tactics.

news-global-econ.title: Brexit Betrayal: Top Labour Leadership Challengers Would See Britain Rejoin the EU
news-global-econ.description:
The leading contenders seeking to topple Prime Minister Sir Keir Starmer have both said that they would overturn the Brexit referendum and rejoin the European Union.

news-global-soc.title: ISIS terror leader at large after US strike kills top commander amid rising Africa threat: analyst
news-global-soc.description: Human intelligence penetrated deep local networks to kill ISIS West Africa commander al-Minuki, described as the group's biggest loss in years.

news-global-soc.title: Taiwan's president says island 'will never be sacrificed or traded' in stern rebuke of China
news-global-soc.description: Taiwanese President Lai Ching-te vows Taiwan will never be sacrificed or traded, rebuking China and thanking Trump for security cooperation.

news-global-soc.description:
In a scene typical of a cinematic military or intelligence tactic, a New Jersey man allegedly ignited an unnerving diversion with camping fuel and fireworks in a Maryland Walmart in order to distract security in order to steal $10,000 in jewelry.

news-global-soc.title: Homeowner Fires Through Door, Kills Alleged Would-Be Intruder
news-global-soc.description:
A Hopkins County, Texas, homeowner spotted a would-be intruder via a Ring camera Tuesday and shot him as the suspect was allegedly reaching into the house via a broken window in the door.
